title: Peppery Mediterranean Lentils Tagine
description: A chewy, peppery tagine packed with wholesome lentils, fresh herbs, and a touch of vegan butter, perfect for a low‑fat post‑workout meal.
instructions: Rinse the lentils under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a large vacuum‑seal bag, combine lentils, diced onion, julienned carrot, halved cherry tomato, minced garlic, vegetable broth, seasoning, and spice blend. Seal the bag and vacuum‑seal.
Preheat your sous‑vide bath to 85 °C (185 °F) and immerse the sealed bag. Cook for 2 hours to allow the lentils to become tender yet chewy.
After 2 hours, carefully remove the bag from the water, open it, and transfer the lentils and liquid into a heat‑proof bowl. Stir gently.
Place the bowl over low heat on the stove and add the vegan butter; stir until melted and incorporated, creating a silky sauce.
Add lemon juice and lemon zest, then fold in the chopped parsley. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve the tagine hot, optionally accompanied by a side of steamed quinoa or a crisp green salad for extra protein.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
